baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Review this branch against issue X and the current PR context. Confirm scope matches maintainer requirements.
evals.expected_output: The agent first states issue contract details, checks contribution/readme rules, and compares branch diffs to the contract before proposing fixes.
assertions: Collects issue or PR context before judging code.
Builds a checklist from issue requirements.
Flags scope and test gaps before giving a ready-to-merge claim.

evals.prompt: Generate a contribution-ready review summary for a candidate branch touching docs and tests.
evals.expected_output: The agent maps changes to the checklist, notes missing validations, and outputs a final readiness statement that includes blocker items.
assertions: References touched files and required checks.
Calls out unresolved maintainer constraints or missing checklist items.
Avoids claiming ready status when requirements are incomplete.
